lock 100% Offline · Zero Telemetry · Open Source

Powerful PDF tools.
100% |

PDFPilot is a fast, privacy-focused desktop application that lets you manage, convert, and secure PDF files entirely on your computer — no cloud, no uploads, no tracking.

25+PDF Tools
100%Offline
0Telemetry
download Download Installer .exe · Windows
Get it on Microsoft Store

computer Windows 10 / 11 · x64

PDFPilot — Offline PDF Workspace
Capabilities

Everything you need for PDFs

25 tools organized into logical workflows. All running locally on your machine.

folder_special

Organize PDF

merge_type
Merge PDF

Combine multiple PDFs into one document

call_split
Split PDF

Extract page ranges or selected pages

delete_sweep
Remove Pages

Delete selected pages from a PDF

apps
Organize PDF

Drag-and-drop page reorder and rotate

document_scanner
Scan to PDF

Import images and extend to scanners

tune

Optimize PDF

compress
Compress PDF

Reduce file size with quality presets

build
Repair PDF

Salvage and rewrite a damaged PDF

text_fields
OCR PDF

Make scanned PDFs searchable with Tesseract

swap_horiz

Convert

image
Image to PDF

Create PDFs from JPG, PNG, or BMP files

description
Office to PDF

Word, PowerPoint, Excel → PDF via LibreOffice

photo
PDF to JPG

Export each page as a JPG image

article
PDF to Word

Convert with best-effort layout preservation

slideshow
PDF to PowerPoint

Layout-preserving slide export

table_chart
PDF to Excel

One rendered page per worksheet

archive
PDF to PDF/A

Archival-oriented normalized PDF copy

edit

Edit PDF

rotate_right
Rotate PDF

Rotate pages by 90, 180, or 270 degrees

format_list_numbered
Page Numbers

Overlay page numbering with position settings

water
Watermark

Apply a text watermark across all pages

crop
Crop PDF

Trim margins with a uniform crop value

security

PDF Security

lock_open
Unlock PDF

Remove encryption when the correct password is known

lock
Protect PDF

Add password encryption to a PDF

draw
Sign PDF

Stamp an image signature into the final page

visibility_off
Redact PDF

Permanently redact matching text content

difference
Compare PDF

Generate a local text-diff report for two PDFs

Interface

See it in action

A clean, organized workspace designed for productivity.

Privacy First

Your files never leave
your device.

PDFPilot processes everything entirely on your computer. No accounts, no cloud, no analytics.

cloud_off
No cloud uploads

Files are processed locally. Nothing is ever sent to a server.

track_changes
No tracking

We don't track which tools you use or what files you open.

analytics
Zero telemetry

No crash reports, no usage analytics, no background connections.

wifi_off
Fully offline capable

Works with no internet connection. Fly or work in remote areas.

shield Privacy Guaranteed
check_circle 100% offline lock No cloud visibility_off No tracking wifi_off Zero telemetry
PDFPilot is running fully offline
